name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem: standalone Cubit + build123d via Plan A (persistent Cubit GUI + PyQt5 QTimer + file-drop IPC). 0.10.0 adds cubit_batch_try / cubit_mesh_auto (scheme ladder validated headlessly, winner replayed in live GUI). 0.9.0 base: failure log, tf-idf retrieval, live doc fetchers. radia-mcp[radia] enables radia-coupled servers.
author: Kengo Sugahara
